content: كُلّ راجِل مَفروض عَلَيْهِ الشُغل وَ الاهتِمام بِبَيْتِه
translations: eng:every man is supposed to work and take care of his home

transcriptions.arabizi: kullaraagil mafrood Aalee|h ilshughl wail'ihtimaem bi|biyt|uh
